{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Archmagi
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Archmagi]] are the designers of [[Horizon]]'s systems.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c9">''The Pilot'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
